context_memory_store.policy: Active packets carry source heads/tails only. Omitted middles survive as hashed retrieval refs so the main conversation stays small.

long_session_eval_plan.name: ten_turn_preload_probe_turn_11
long_session_eval_plan.purpose: Expose late context failures by preloading 10 turns and checking whether probe turn 11 still uses the retained context correctly.
long_session_eval_plan.release_gate: For long-running workflows, run or document this eval before marking context handling complete.

no_slop_workflow.task: Genesis codebase index subagent 02: Core deep module boundary map. Read-only. Do not edit source. Return files/routes indexed, boot implications, verification needed, and blockers.

phases.goal: Find how the system works and identify exact files, flows, and line references.
phases.done_when: Reviewer can understand the system path without re-searching the repo.

phases.goal: Specify every intended change, file target, test, and rollback concern before editing code.
phases.done_when: Plan is shorter than the change and catches design mistakes before code.

phases.goal: Make the planned changes, keep context under budget, and update the plan as phases complete.
phases.done_when: Tests, route smoke, hashes, or runtime evidence prove the requested behavior.
